creator: kwiat3k@panic.pl
text:
I’d like to report that one of polish mirrors is dead. It’s listed both in Handbook and in installer as ftp2.pl.freebsd.org.
It doesn’t have DNS record:

$ host ftp2.pl.freebsd.org
Host ftp2.pl.freebsd.org not found: 3(NXDOMAIN)

Also reported to hostmaster@pl.freebsd.org

Regards,
Mateusz Kwiatkowski
